---
title: "Georgina  S. Morgan"
---

## Georgina  S. Morgan

**Dates:** (b.1840/1)

### Description

novelist, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1881-99)

### Biography

She was wife of the Rev. Morgan Morgan, episcopal minister of  St. Peter’s, Peterhead.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 8th 1888

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
